## USER (2026-07-20 03:19:52)

有没有类似plan或者ask的让cc先看代码并进行讨论的功能？

---

## ASSISTANT (2026-07-20 03:20:03)

[{'type': 'thinking', 'thinking': 'The user is asking in Chinese whether there\'s a feature similar to "plan" or "ask" that lets Claude Code first look at the code and then discuss it before making changes.\n\nYes, there are a few relevant features:\n\n1. **Plan mode** (`/plan`) - This enters a planning mode where Claude Code will analyze the code and propose a plan before making any changes. The user can review and approve the plan before execution.\n\n2. **Ask mode** - In some Claude Code interfaces, there\'s a way to ask questions without triggering edits.\n\n3. The `/plan` slash command or `EnterPlanMode` tool - This switches into plan mode where I analyze and propose before acting.\nThe main options available are plan mode where I propose changes for approval first, ask mode for discussion without automatic edits, or simply asking questions normally without requesting modifications.', 'signature': ''}]

---

## ASSISTANT (2026-07-20 03:20:07)

[{'type': 'text', 'text': '有几个方式可以让 Claude Code 先分析代码再讨论，而不是直接动手改：\n\n1. **Plan mode** — 输入 `/plan`，我会进入规划模式：先分析代码、提出方案，你确认后我才执行。适合复杂任务。\n\n2. **直接提问** — 用描述性语言问问题（"这段代码怎么工作的？"、"如果我想加 X 功能该怎么做？"），我会分析并讨论，不会主动改代码。\n\n3. **CLI 启动参数** — 启动时用 `claude --mode plan` 默认进入 plan 模式；用 `claude --mode ask` 进入纯问答模式（完全不会写文件）。\n\n最常用的是 `/plan` — 需要我现在进入 plan 模式吗？'}]

---

## USER (2026-07-20 03:20:53)

有没有类似codex中的auto-review功能

---

## ASSISTANT (2026-07-20 03:20:58)

[{'type': 'thinking', 'thinking': 'The user is asking about an "auto-review" feature similar to what exists in Codex (OpenAI\'s coding agent). They want to know if Claude Code has something similar - a feature that automatically reviews code changes.\n\nLet me think about what Claude Code offers:\n\n1. There\'s a `/review` skill listed in the available skills - this seems relevant.\n2. There\'s also a `simplify` skill that reviews changed code for reuse/simplification.\n3. The `code-reviewer` agent type isn\'t listed but there might be something similar.\n\nLet me tell the user about the review capabilities available in Claude Code.', 'signature': ''}]

---

## ASSISTANT (2026-07-20 03:21:06)

[{'type': 'text', 'text': 'Claude Code 有几个类似的 review 功能：\n\n**1. `/review` skill** — 对当前改动做代码审查，类似 auto-review：\n\n```\n/review\n```\n\n它会检查你的 diff，找 bug、逻辑问题、安全隐患等。\n\n**2. `/simplify` skill** — 专门审查改动中的简化/重构机会（不找 bug，只看代码质量）。\n\n**3. `/security-review` skill** — 专注安全层面的审查。\n\n**4. PR review** — 如果你推了 PR，可以让我用 `gh` 读取 PR diff 然后 review。\n\n---\n\n**和 Codex auto-review 的区别：**\n\n- Codex 的 auto-review 是在每次代码生成后**自动触发**的内置流程。\n- Claude Code 目前没有"每次改完自动 review"的内置行为，但你可以：\n  - 用 **hooks** 配置：在每次 edit 后自动触发 review（通过 `/update-config` 设置）\n  - 在对话中说"改完后帮我 review 一下"，我会在完成后主动审查\n  - 用 `/review` 手动触发\n\n需要我帮你配一个自动 review 的 hook，或者现在对当前改动跑一次 `/review`？'}]

---

## USER (2026-07-20 03:21:55)

我的意思是你的操作不需要我一直点同意

---

## ASSISTANT (2026-07-20 03:22:03)

[{'type': 'thinking', 'thinking': 'The user is asking about a mode where they don\'t need to keep clicking "approve" for every tool call — similar to Codex\'s auto-review where the agent runs autonomously without needing permission for each action.\n\nThis is about Claude Code\'s permission system. There are a few ways to reduce permission prompts:\n\n1. **`--dangerously-skip-permissions`** — skips all permission checks (not recommended for production)\n2. **Permission settings** — configure allowed tools/commands in `.claude/settings.json` or `~/.claude/settings.json`\n3. **`/fewer-permission-prompts`** skill — scans transcripts and adds allowlists\n4. **Yolo mode** — the CLI\'s `--dangerously-skip-permissions` flag or broad permission configurations let the agent run without interruption', 'signature': ''}]

---

## ASSISTANT (2026-07-20 03:22:07)

[{'type': 'text', 'text': '明白了，你是想减少权限确认提示。几个方案：\n\n**1. 启动时跳过所有权限（最激进）：**\n```bash\nclaude --dangerously-skip-permissions\n```\n完全自主运行，不会弹任何确认。\n\n**2. 按需放行常用操作** — 在 `.claude/settings.json` 里配 `allowedTools`：\n```json\n{\n  "permissions": {\n    "allow": [\n      "Read",\n      "Edit",\n      "Write",\n      "Bash(grep:*)",\n      "Bash(find:*)",\n      "Bash(python:*)",\n      "Bash(git:*)"\n    ]\n  }\n}\n```\n\n**3. `/fewer-permission-prompts` skill** — 自动扫描你之前的操作记录，生成合理的 allowlist：\n```\n/fewer-permission-prompts\n```\n\n**4. 会话内按 `a`** — 对某类工具选"Always allow"，本次会话内不再询问。\n\n---\n\n**推荐：** 如果你信任当前项目环境，用方案 1 最省事。如果想精细控制，用方案 2 或 3。\n\n需要我帮你配置哪种？'}]

---
